purpose: Define and realize the first crate-backed adapter execution contract for deterministic Git fact capture beyond the current minimal projection emitter.

toolchain_requirements: crate registry access for initial dependency resolution
notes: gix is consumed through a repo-local Rust helper crate, not through CLI parsing.
The Python emitter remains the operator surface, but Git facts are produced by crate-backed code.

invocation_modes: cargo run against the repo-local helper crate
prebuilt helper binary reuse once target/debug/gix_runtime_helper exists
output_invariants: HEAD and branch/ref state are explicit
diff output names the comparison ref
output shape is deterministic for unchanged Git state

required_checks: runtime availability is explicit in the realization report
diff_state emission succeeds against an explicit comparison ref
deterministic replay on unchanged state produces identical outputs

allowed_now: report fields that distinguish minimal from real execution
not_yet_allowed: hiding helper build/runtime failures behind minimal emitters
